message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PCWS Sequences

actor Customer
rectangle "PCWS" as pcws
database "PostgreSQL" as postgresql
rectangle "Disk" as disk
rectangle "transfer_logs.sh" as transfer_logs
rectangle "Account Service" as account_service
rectangle "Datalog Service" as datalog_service

Customer -> pcws : request image
pcws -> account_service : check account permission
pcws -> pcws : generate image
pcws -> disk : write data log
pcws -> Customer : image

note right of disk: some time later

rectangle loop_frame <<loop>> [for each log] {
    transfer_logs -> disk : read data log
    transfer_logs -> datalog_service : send data log
}

@enduml
```
